/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--version-script=/tmp/mysql/client/json_binlog.ver  -Wl,-rpath,'$ORIGIN/../../private' -shared -Wl,-soname,libjson_binlog.so.8.0.45 -o ../library_output_directory/libjson_binlog.so.8.0.45 CMakeFiles/json_binlog.dir/__/sql-common/json_binary.cc.o CMakeFiles/json_binlog.dir/__/sql-common/json_dom.cc.o CMakeFiles/json_binlog.dir/__/sql-common/json_path.cc.o CMakeFiles/json_binlog.dir/__/sql-common/json_syntax_check.cc.o CMakeFiles/json_binlog.dir/__/sql-common/sql_string.cc.o  ../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a ../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a
